description: Example-only config for the future JJ AI Dispatcher Launcher. Do not place secrets here.
notes: This file is example config only.
Copy to launcher.config.local.json for machine-specific values.
Keep token values, API keys, and secrets out of launcher config.
PLACEHOLDER_TOKEN_DO_NOT_USE is a placeholder only; replace it locally if your adapter requires a token, and do not commit real tokens.
Dispatcher Bridge health checks use 127.0.0.1 only. Do not expose or tunnel port 8787.
Future local, VM, and cloud migration should be handled by changing config values only.
